event: Wait. Let them come nearer (Military ambush in winter)
description: A wintry forest scene showing soldiers in winter clothing crouching among snow-covered birch trees and dense undergrowth. The soldiers are partially hidden, blending into the white landscape as they wait in ambush. Heavy snow covers every surface — branches, ground, and the soldiers themselves. The scene is almost monochromatic in whites, grays, and dark greens, with only the soldiers' faces and uniforms providing warm tones. The atmosphere is tense and frozen.
